messages.content: hi
Loaded mind-context, displayed reduced mindmap and last session summaries. Greeted user and confirmed K_MIND session active.
session node should not be empty - pointed out mindmap renders with empty session node
Added child node to session in mind_memory.md: c7919903 session start [far:1,near:1]. Committed and pushed.
nodes have to be human representative text strings, not raw IDs
Fixed session node to use human-readable description. Added mindmap_node_text convention: human readable descriptions only, no raw IDs or internal pointers.
inline refs with brackets cause mermaid syntax errors, should know that by convention
Removed redundant inline refs line from mindmap_node_text convention. Brackets breaking mermaid is already known from existing conventions.
show me
Displayed reduced mindmap with session/work/documentation nodes and last 4 near_memory summaries.
screenshot showing mermaid syntax error in text, mermaid version 11.10.0
Investigated syntax error. File looks valid. Testing if init directive causes issue with mermaid 11.10.0 by rendering without it.
keep inline things for you, not human and diagram friendly, not required in diagram and recent context
Understood. Removed init directive from rendered mermaid output and near:N prefixes from recent context display. These are internal metadata only.
mermaid syntax error - mindmap is a reserved keyword causing render failure

Fixed: removed 'mindmap' reserved word from all node text in mind_memory.md. Added node_text_rules convention (conv-005) to conventions.json covering human-readable text, no IDs, and avoiding mermaid reserved words.
should see 5 leafs on session node
Expanded session node to 5 leaves: session init, empty node fix, human readable text convention, removed redundant refs rule, reserved word syntax error fix.
diagram does not occupy whole width. normal mode should show right side group names as collapsed nodes to maintain half/half width

Fixed normal mode rendering: show right side groups (architecture, constraints, conventions) as collapsed leaf nodes without children. This maintains left-right half/half width. Left side expanded, right side collapsed.
mermaid mindmap is radial, not left-right. the convention was wrong — I was stating things I couldn't deliver

Acknowledged: mermaid mindmap type uses radial layout, cannot control left-right positioning. The left-right half/half convention was incorrectly written. Need to either accept radial layout or switch diagram type. Asked user for direction.
confirmed radial layout works, fix conventions
Updated display_layout convention: radial auto-layout, normal mode session expanded plus groups collapsed, full mode all expanded. Fixed mindmap nodes and conventions.json.
do not make me wait and repeat - always show the diagram after changes without being asked
Understood. Always render the diagram immediately after any change. Never make the user ask to see it. This is a core convention.
you broke the color convention - the init theme directive is required for colors not optional metadata

Fixed: the %%init%% theme directive must always be included in rendered output - it controls the blue color scheme per mindmap_theme_light convention. Only near:N refs and raw IDs are internal metadata.
why are boxes black with white line at bottom - theme not working

The %%init%% theme directive does not work with mermaid mindmap type - only applies to flowcharts etc. The blue theme convention was never rendering. Black boxes are default mindmap styling. Asked user whether to accept defaults or switch diagram type.
no hope for custom blue, keep default theme, put it in convention
Switched to mermaid default theme. Updated mind_memory.md init directive and convention. theme_default: always include init directive with default theme for auto-colored nodes.
just fix what was defined, dont add nodes. also stop breaking things when updating
Fixed node_text_rules convention removing incorrect init directive claim. Fixed stale mind_memory_ref in conv-002. Need to be more careful with changes - verify before committing.

summaries.summary: Session start: loaded mind-context, displayed mindmap, greeted user
fix: added session child node to mindmap so it renders with current session context
fix: mindmap nodes must use human-readable text, added convention mindmap_node_text
fix: removed redundant inline refs convention line, brackets break mermaid syntax is already known
displayed current mindmap and recent context summaries
debugging mermaid syntax error in mindmap rendering, testing without init directive
convention: no inline refs or init directives in rendered output, keep internal only
fix: mermaid reserved word 'mindmap' in node text caused syntax error, added node_text_rules convention
fix: expanded session node to 5 leaves matching all session activities
convention clarified: normal mode shows right side groups collapsed not omitted, maintains half/half width
discovered mermaid mindmap is radial only, left-right convention was wrong, need to choose new approach
fix: corrected display layout convention to radial, updated all references
convention: always render diagram after changes, never make user ask twice
fix: init theme directive is required for colors, must always be in rendered output
discovered init theme directive does not work with mermaid mindmap type, blue colors never rendered
fix: switched to mermaid default theme, updated convention and mindmap file
fix: cleaned up incorrect convention claims, user frustrated with repeated breakages
